title: Deliciously Roasted Slovakian Pork Roast
description: A savory and energizing Slovakian dish featuring a deliciously roasted pork roast, seasoned with kosher salt and cooked to perfection in a donabe vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the pork roast with kosher salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and onion powder.
Heat the olive oil in the donabe vessel over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork roast in the donabe vessel until browned on all sides.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the donabe vessel.
Transfer the donabe vessel to the preheated oven.
Roast the pork and vegetables in the oven for 20 minutes per pound.
Remove the donabe vessel from the oven and let the pork rest for 10 minutes.
Slice the pork roast and serve with the roasted carrots and potatoes.
